subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is grace and bounty, His is generosity and munificence, and His is grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الفضل و العطاء و له الجود و السخاء و له العظمه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @law of transformation and change, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
